case_title: LOURDES CHAVEZ VS. JOSE E. GUARNEROS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, LOURDES AS TO DEFENDANT GUARNEROS, JOSE E. DBA 101 JANITORIAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, LOURDES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUARNEROS, JOSE E. DBA 101 JANITORIAL $73,475.53 PRINCIPAL, $8,464.72 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $82,390.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
